name: meshy-prompt-studio
description: Codex plugin for creating Meshy prompts and one-command Meshy API asset packs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create Meshy prompts and asset packs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Meshy Prompt Studio helps Codex write focused Meshy prompts and directly run Meshy API workflows for Text to 3D asset packs, Image to 3D, textures, remeshing, rigging, animations, exports, and troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Use Meshy to create a low-poly game prop asset pack and download the GLB.
Create a riggable teacher character asset pack with Meshy.
Write Image to 3D and texture prompts for this prop.
